center.name: Zoologische Mededelingen
center.summary: Zoologische Mededelingen是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Pied thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Dates of avian names introduced in early volumes of the Journal of the Asiatic Society of Bengal |journal=Zoologische Mededelingen |volume=80 |issue=5 |year=2006 |url=http://www.zoologischemededelingen.nl/80/nr05/a05 |access-date=28 August 2009 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110724174023/http://www.zoologischemededelingen.nl/80/nr05/a05 |archive-date=24 July 2011 }} | synonyms = Zoothera wardiiTurdulus wardiiTurdus wardii protonym }} The pied thrush (Geokichla wardii) is a member of the thrush family found in India and Sri Lanka
